name: diag_01_split_balance
description: Set-a-only class balance, synthetic noisy-poor counts, and source-record leakage check.
report_candidate: Strong report candidate for methods/QC appendix.

name: diag_02_qrs_detector_counts
description: wqrs/eplimited count plausibility, detector agreement, and bSQI lead-level behavior.
report_candidate: Good appendix candidate when discussing QRS alignment risk.

name: diag_03_feature_integrity
description: 84-feature nonfinite/range/scale checks.
report_candidate: Good methods appendix candidate.

name: diag_04_pooled_sqi_distributions
description: Pooled feature distributions by label for all seven SQIs.
report_candidate: Useful appendix candidate; can support explanations of fSQI/basSQI gaps.

name: diag_05_lead_median_profiles
description: Median SQI values by lead and label.
report_candidate: Useful for appendix or internal validation.

name: diag_06_normalization_train_test
description: Train/test distribution check before and after normalization for lead-II sSQI and kSQI.
report_candidate: Internal QC; mention only if normalization needs defense.

name: diag_07_noise_allocation_snr
description: NSTDB segment allocation, em/ma balance, and example per-lead SNR checks.
report_candidate: Good methods/QC appendix candidate.

name: diag_08_resampling_wave_psd
description: Raw 500 Hz versus resampled 125 Hz waveform and PSD comparison.
report_candidate: Internal QC; useful if preprocessing details are challenged.

name: diag_09_qrs_overlay_12lead
description: 12-lead ECG with cached wqrs and EP Limited detections.
report_candidate: Good appendix candidate for detector validation.

name: diag_10_raw_seta_qc
description: Raw Set-a 500 Hz waveform, per-lead amplitude spread, and PSD sanity check.
report_candidate: Good preprocessing appendix candidate.

name: diag_11_resample_alias_reference
description: Current 125 Hz cache versus steep reference resampling error plots.
report_candidate: Strong preprocessing/QC appendix candidate.

name: diag_12_noise_wave12_gallery
description: Full 12-lead paper-aligned em/ma synthetic noise residual gallery.
report_candidate: Strong augmentation appendix candidate.

name: diag_13_single_feature_auc_top20
description: Top-20 single-feature SQI separability across the current paper-aligned 84-feature table.
report_candidate: Good analysis figure for feature behavior.

name: diag_14_qrs_hr_by_lead
description: HR-by-lead boxplots and pooled HR distributions from the current QRS cache.
report_candidate: Good detector sanity appendix candidate.
